project_type: AWS CDK TypeScript app - sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: npm with tsc for compilation, CDK for infrastructure synthesis
test_framework: Jest with ts-jest transform, aws-cdk-lib/assertions for CDK testing, snapshot tests
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npx jest' to verify all tests pass. 2. Run 'npx cdk synth' to verify synthesis. 3. Update snapshot with 'npx jest --updateSnapshot' if template changes are intentional.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can access npm registry. No Docker daemon assumed. Node.js available.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then minimal implementation. Conventional commits. Update ARCHITECTURE.md with any infrastructure changes. Prefer L2/L3 constructs. Run tests + cdk synth before pushing.
key_patterns: Single stack in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Tests use Template.fromStack() with Match utilities. App entry in bin/cdk-base.ts. Lambda code in lambda/ directory. Snapshot test at end of test file. jest.config.js uses ts-jest transform with setupFilesAfterEnv for autoclean.
directory_structure: bin/ - CDK app entry point (cdk-base.ts). lib/ - CDK stack constructs (cdk-base-stack.ts). lambda/ - Lambda function code (audio-processor/index.ts). test/ - Jest test files + __snapshots__/. .github/workflows/ - CI config.
